name: api-to-postman-generator
description: Convert API definitions into Postman test scripts

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix "[{name}]" --prefix-colors "blue,cyan" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix backend && npm run test --prefix frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix backend && npm run lint --prefix frontend
scripts.format: npm run format --prefix backend && npm run format --prefix frontend
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.clean: rmdir /s /q backend/dist backend/node_modules frontend/dist frontend/node_modules node_modules 2>nul & npm run install-all
